positive: A celestial, stylized depiction of a majestic fox silhouette leaping across a crescent moon, surrounded by vibrant nebulae swirls of sapphire blue, emerald green, and deep violet. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, designed to look excellent on a t-shirt. Incorporate clean, graphic line work and dot-work textures (stippling) for depth, mimicking a woodblock print style. The lighting should be ethereal, coming from the background nebulae, making the foreground silhouette crisp and stark against the vibrant, cosmic backdrop. High contrast, intricate detail, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, lowres, artifacts, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, noise, cropped, copyright, logo, trademark, text, photorealism
